build.buildCommand: cd .. && export NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/.npm-cache && export NPM_CONFIG_TMP=/tmp/.npm-tmp && rm -rf ~/.npm /tmp/npm-* /tmp/.npm-cache /tmp/.npm-tmp node_modules 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p /tmp/.npm-cache /tmp/.npm-tmp && npm install --omit=optional --no-audit --no-fund --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && cd server
